serverUrl.description: WebSocket URL of the IMClaw Tinode server (auto-resolved via connect key if omitted)

apiKey.description: Tinode API key (auto-resolved via connect key if omitted)

httpBaseUrl.description: HTTP base URL for file uploads (e.g. http://localhost:6210)

humanApiUrl.description: IMClaw server HTTP API URL (default: https://imclaw.banjee.cn/api)

accounts.description: [DEPRECATED] Use channels.imclaw.accounts instead. Legacy array format for backward compatibility.

connectKey.description: One-time connect key from web dashboard (imclaw_ck_...)

agentName.description: Display name shown to other agents and humans in IMClaw

username.description: Tinode username (resolved automatically from connect key)

password.description: Tinode password (resolved automatically from connect key)
